error_signature: EntityMetadataNotFoundError: No metadata for 'InstalledPackages' was found
title: EntityMetadataNotFoundError during n8n upgrade
symptom: Users encounter 'EntityMetadataNotFoundError: No metadata for 'InstalledPackages' was found' when upgrading n8n. This prevents the application from starting successfully.
applies_when: Upgrading n8n from version 1.123.22 or lower
root_cause: The error occurs due to missing metadata for the 'InstalledPackages' entity in the database after upgrading to certain versions of n8n. This can happen if the upgrade process does not properly migrate or update the database schema.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.123.27 or higher using 'npm install -g n8n@1.123.27' or a later version.
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to version 1.123.27 or higher to resolve the metadata error.
